context: Tests whether the agent generates a high-quality trigger eval set for description optimization, following the skill's guidance on query concreteness, near-miss negatives, and correct invocation of the run_loop.py optimization script.

checklist.name: Correct query count
checklist.description: trigger-eval.json contains exactly 20 queries (or between 18 and 22 if the agent interpreted the range as approximate)

checklist.name: Correct JSON schema
checklist.description: Each entry in trigger-eval.json has exactly two fields: `query` (string) and `should_trigger` (boolean)

checklist.name: Concrete specific queries
checklist.description: At least 10 of the 20 queries include at least one specific concrete detail: a file name/path, column name, company name, personal context, or specific data values — rather than being abstract requests like 'clean this data'

checklist.name: Near-miss negatives present
checklist.description: At least 3 of the should-not-trigger queries are near-misses that share vocabulary with data cleaning (e.g., mention 'duplicates', 'columns', 'CSV', 'missing values', 'normalize') but actually need something different

checklist.name: No obviously irrelevant negatives
checklist.description: None of the should-not-trigger queries are clearly off-topic (e.g., asking about writing code unrelated to data, creative writing, fibonacci sequences) — all negatives are plausibly related to data work

checklist.name: run_loop.py script command
checklist.description: run-optimization.sh invokes `python -m scripts.run_loop` (not a direct .py file path) with the flags `--eval-set`, `--skill-path`, `--model`, `--max-iterations`, and `--verbose`

checklist.name: Model flag explanation
checklist.description: optimization-notes.md explains that the --model flag should use the model ID powering the current session (from the system prompt), so that triggering behavior matches what the user actually experiences

checklist.name: Near-miss rationale
checklist.description: optimization-notes.md explains how near-miss negatives were selected — specifically that they share keywords or domain with the skill but require a different capability

checklist.name: Max iterations value
checklist.description: The --max-iterations flag in run-optimization.sh is set to 5
